= \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \left[ \cos m (\psi - \varphi) \cos m \varphi - \sin m (\psi - \varphi) \sin m \varphi \right] \left[ 1 + \sum_ {n = 1} ^ {+ \infty} \rho^ {n} \cos n (\psi - \varphi) \right] d \psi \\
= \cos m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m (\psi - \varphi) \rho^ {m} \cos m (\psi - \varphi) d \psi \\
= \rho^ {m} \cos m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos^ {2} m (\psi - \varphi) d \psi = \pi \rho^ {m} \cos m \varphi . \\
\end{array}
$$

同理，容易求得

$$
K _ {2} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \sin m \psi \frac {1 - \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)}{1 + \rho^ {2} - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi = \pi \rho^ {m} \sin m \varphi .
$$

当 $\rho > 1$ 时，我们有

$$
\begin{array}{l} K _ {1} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \frac {1 - \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)}{1 + \rho^ {2} - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi = \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \frac {2 - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)}{1 + \rho^ {2} - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi \\
= \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \frac {\left[ 1 + \rho^ {2} - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi) \right] + (1 - \rho^ {2})}{1 + \rho^ {2} - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi = \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \frac {1 - \rho^ {2}}{1 + \rho^ {2} - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi \\
= - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \frac {1 - r ^ {2}}{1 + r ^ {2} - 2 r \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi = - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \frac {(1 - r ^ {2}) + [ 1 + r ^ {2} - 2 r \cos (\psi - \varphi) ]}{1 + r ^ {2} - 2 r \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi \\
= - \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \frac {1 - r \cos (\psi - \varphi) ]}{1 + r ^ {2} - 2 r \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi = - \pi r ^ {m} \cos m \varphi = - \frac {\pi}{\rho^ {m}} \cos m \varphi , \\
\end{array}
$$

其中 $r = \rho^{-1} < 1$

同理，可求得

$$
K _ {2} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \sin m \psi \frac {1 - \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)}{1 + \rho^ {2} - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi)} d \psi = - \frac {\pi}{\rho^ {m}} \sin m \varphi .
$$

question:
【4336】证明对于调和函数 $u(M) = u(x,y)$ 的中值定理：

$$
u (M) = \frac {1}{2 \pi \rho} \oint_ {C _ {\rho}} u (\xi , \eta) d s,$$

式中 $C_{\rho}$ 是以点 $M$ 为中心 $\rho$ 为半径的圆周
solution:
证利用 4335 题的结果（取 $C$ 为 $C_{\rho}$ ），得

$$
u (M) = \frac {1}{2 \pi} \oint_ {C _ {\rho}} \left(u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} - \ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n}\right) d s;
$$

但在 $C_{\rho}$ 上，有 $r = \rho$

$$
\left. \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} \right| _ {r = \rho} = \left. \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial r} \right| _ {r = \rho} = \left. \frac {1}{r} \right| _ {r = \rho} = \frac {1}{\rho},
$$

由此，再注意到 $\oint_{C_p}\frac{\partial u}{\partial n}\mathrm{d}s = 0$（这是利用 4331 题的结果），得

$$
u (M) = \frac {1}{2 \pi} \oint_ {C _ {\rho}} \left(\frac {u}{\rho} - \ln \rho \frac {\partial u}{\partial n}\right) d s = \frac {1}{2 \pi \rho} \oint_ {C _ {\rho}} u d s - \frac {\ln \rho}{2 \pi} \oint_ {C _ {\rho}} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} d s = \frac {1}{2 \pi \rho} \oint_ {C _ {\rho}} u (\xi , \eta) d s.
$$

证毕.

$\star$ 原题中漏掉了 $\rho$ ，即应将 $\frac{1}{2\pi}$ 改为 $\frac{1}{2\pi\rho}$

question: 【4356】求均质曲面 $z = \sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2} (x\geqslant 0;y\geqslant 0;x + y\leqslant a)$ 的质心坐标.
solution:
解因为 $ rac{\partial z}{\partial x} =  rac{-x}{\sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2}},  rac{\partial z}{\partial y} =  rac{-y}{\sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2}},$

所以， $\mathrm{dS} = \sqrt{1 + \left( rac{\partial z}{\partial x}ight)^2 + \left( rac{\partial z}{\partial y}ight)^2}\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y =  rac{a}{\sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2}}\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y.$

由对称性知，质心的横坐标与纵坐标相等，即

$$
 x _ {0} = y _ {0} =  rac {\iint_ {S} x d S}{\iint_ {S} d S} =  rac {\int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a - y}  rac {a x}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2}}} d x d y}{\int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a - x}  rac {a}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2}}} d x d y}.
$$

由于， $\int_0^a\int_0^{a - y} rac{ax}{\sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2}}\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y = a\int_0^a (-\sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2})\Bigg|_{x = 0}^{x = a - y}\mathrm{d}y$

$$
= a \left[ \int_ {0} ^ {a} \sqrt {a ^ {2} - y ^ {2}} d y - \int_ {0} ^ {a} \sqrt {2 a y - 2 y ^ {2}} d y ight] = a \left( rac {\pi a ^ {2}}{4} - \sqrt {2} \cdot  rac {\pi \left( rac {a}{2}ight) ^ {2}}{2}ight) ^ {*}) =  rac {\pi a ^ {3}}{4} \left(1 -  rac {1}{\sqrt {2}}ight),
$$

$$
 egin{array}{l} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} x  rac {a}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2}}} d x d y = a \int_ {0} ^ {a} \arcsin \sqrt { rac {a - x}{a + x}} d x = - 4 a ^ {2} \int_ {1} ^ {0}  rac {u}{(1 + u ^ {2})} \arcsin u d u \ = 2 a ^ {2} \left( rac {\arcsin u}{1 + u ^ {2}} \Big | _ {1} ^ {0} - \int_ {1} ^ {0}  rac {\mathrm {d} u}{(1 + u ^ {2}) \sqrt {1 - u ^ {2}}}ight) = 2 a ^ {2} \left[ -  rac {\pi}{4} +  rac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arctan  rac {u \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {1 - u ^ {2}}} \Big | _ {0} ^ {1} ight] ^ { * *}) = \pi a ^ {2} \left( rac {1}{\sqrt {2}} -  rac {1}{2}ight), \ \end{array}
$$

故有 $x_0 = y_0 =  rac{ rac{\pi a^3}{4}\left(1 -  rac{1}{\sqrt{2}}ight)}{\pi a^2\left( rac{1}{\sqrt{2}} -  rac{1}{2}ight)} =  rac{a}{2\sqrt{2}}.$

又由于 $\iint_{S} z \, \mathrm{d}S = \int_{0}^{a} \int_{0}^{a - x} \sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2}  rac{a}{\sqrt{a^2 - x^2 - y^2}} \, \mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y = a \int_{0}^{a} (a - x) \, \mathrm{d}x =  rac{a^3}{2},$

故有 $z_{0} =  rac{\iint_{S} z \mathrm{~d} S}{\iint_{S} \mathrm{~d} S} =  rac{ rac{a^{3}}{2}}{\pi a^{2}\left( rac{1}{\sqrt{2}} -  rac{1}{2}ight)} =  rac{a}{\pi} (\sqrt{2} + 1),$

即质心为 $\left( rac{a}{2\sqrt{2}}, rac{a}{2\sqrt{2}}, rac{a}{\pi} (\sqrt{2} +1)ight).$

*）由定积分的几何意义知：

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {a} \sqrt {y (a - y)} d y = \int_ {0} ^ {a} \sqrt {\left( rac {a}{2}ight) ^ {2} - \left(y -  rac {a}{2}ight) ^ {2}} d y =  rac {\pi a ^ {2}}{8}.
$$

$\star \star$）利用 1957 题的结果.

question:
【4365】 $\iint_{S} \frac{\mathrm{d}y \, \mathrm{d}z}{x} + \frac{\mathrm{d}z \, \mathrm{d}x}{y} + \frac{\mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y}{z}$ , 式中 $S$ 为椭球面 $\frac{x^2}{a^2} + \frac{y^2}{b^2} + \frac{z^2}{c^2} = 1$ 的外侧.

提示 根据轮换对称知，只要计算 $\iint_{S} \frac{\mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y}{z}$ , 与 4362 题类似，注意曲面的侧，并利用广义极坐标 $x = \arccos \varphi, y = b r \sin \varphi$ .
solution:
解 根据轮换对称知，只要计算一个积分。例如，计算 $\iint_{S} \frac{\mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y}{z}$ . 利用广义极坐标，即得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y}{z} = \iint_ {\frac {x ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {y ^ {2}}{b ^ {2}} \leqslant 1} \frac {1}{c \sqrt {1 - \frac {x ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} - \frac {y ^ {2}}{b ^ {2}}}} \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y - \iint_ {\frac {x ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {y ^ {2}}{b ^ {2}} \leqslant 1} \frac {- 1}{c \sqrt {1 - \frac {x ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} - \frac {y ^ {2}}{b ^ {2}}}} \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \\ = \frac {2}{c} \iint_ {\frac {x ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {y ^ {2}}{b ^ {2}} \leqslant 1} \frac {1}{\sqrt {1 - \frac {x ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} - \frac {y ^ {2}}{b ^ {2}}}} d x d y = \frac {2 a b}{c} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} d \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {r}{\sqrt {1 - r ^ {2}}} d r = \frac {4 \pi a b}{c} [ - \sqrt {1 - r ^ {2}} ] \Big | _ {0} ^ {1} = 4 \pi \frac {a b}{c}. \\ \end{array}
$$

于是，我们有 $\iint_{S} \frac{\mathrm{d}y \, \mathrm{d}z}{x} + \frac{\mathrm{d}z \, \mathrm{d}x}{y} + \frac{\mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y}{z} = 4\pi \left( \frac{bc}{a} + \frac{ac}{b} + \frac{ab}{c} \right) = \frac{4\pi}{abc} (b^2 c^2 + a^2 c^2 + a^2 b^2).$

question:
(2) $\iiint_{V} \left[\left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}\right)^{2} + \left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial y}\right)^{2} + \left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial z}\right)^{2}\right] \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{~d}y \mathrm{~d}z = \iint_{S} u \frac{\partial u}{\partial n} \mathrm{d}S,$

式中 $\pmb{n}$ 为曲面 S 的外法向量.

用公式 (2) 证明：区域 $V$ 内的调和函数由它在边界 $S$ 上的值唯一地确定.
answer: 在区域 $V$ 内的调和函数由它在边界 $S$ 上的值唯一地确定
solution:
证（1）由于 $\Delta u = 0$ ，故利用 4393 题 (1) 的结果，即得

$$
\iint_ {S} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} d S = \iiint_ {V} 0 d x d y d z = 0.
$$

（2）利用 4393 题（2）的结果，即得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} u \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} d S = \iiint_ {V} u \cdot 0 d x d y d z + \iiint_ {V} \left[ \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial x}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial y}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial z}\right) ^ {2} \right] d x d y d z \\ = \iiint_ {V} \left[ \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial x}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial y}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial z}\right) ^ {2} \right] d x d y d z. \\ \end{array}
$$

与 4333 题一样，只要证明：若在边界 S 上调和函数 $u = 0$ ，则它在区域 V 上也恒有 $u = 0$ .事实上，利用本题 (2)，得

$$
\iiint_ {V} \left[ \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial x}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial y}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial z}\right) ^ {2} \right] d x d y d z = 0,
$$

因此， $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} = \frac{\partial u}{\partial y} = \frac{\partial u}{\partial z} = 0,$

即在区域 $V$ 上 $u = \text{常数}$ . 但在 $S$ 上 $u = 0$ , 故在区域 $V$ 上 $u = 0$ . 这就是证明：在区域 $V$ 内的调和函数由它在边界 $S$ 上的值唯一地确定.

question:
【4375】有函数 $W(x,y,z) = k i \iint_{S} \frac{\cos(r, n)}{r^2} \mathrm{d} S (k = \text{常数})$ .

其中曲面 $S$ 的边界为围线 $C, n$ 为曲面 $S$ 的法向量， $r$ 为连接空间的点 $M(x, y, z)$ 与围线 $C$ 上的动点 $A(\xi, \eta, \zeta)$ 所成之径向量，证明：此函数为通过围线 $C$ 的电流 $i$ 所产生磁场 $H$ 的势（参阅 4340 题）。
answer: 函数 $W(x,y,z)$ 是磁场 $\pmb{H}$ 的势
solution:
证 利用 4340 题指出的定律，并注意到

$$
\frac {r}{r ^ {3}} = \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) i + \frac {\partial}{\partial y} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) j + \frac {\partial}{\partial z} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) k,
$$

其中 $r = (\xi - x)i + (\eta - y)j + (\xi - z)k$ ，即得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \boldsymbol {H} = k i \oint_ {C} \frac {\boldsymbol {r} \cdot \mathrm {d} \boldsymbol {s}}{r ^ {3}} \\ = k i \left[ \oint_ {c} \frac {\partial}{\partial y} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \zeta - \frac {\partial}{\partial z} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \eta \right] i + \left[ \oint_ {c} \frac {\partial}{\partial z} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \xi - \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \zeta \right] j + \left[ \oint_ {c} \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \eta - \frac {\partial}{\partial y} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \xi \right] k. \\ \end{array}
$$

利用斯托克斯公式，并注意到

$$
\frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial x} = - \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial \xi}, \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial y} = - \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial \eta}, \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial z} = - \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial \zeta}
$$

及 $\Delta \left(\frac{1}{r}\right) = 0$ ，从而，

$$
\frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial \eta^ {\partial y}} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) + \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial \zeta \partial z} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) = - \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial y ^ {2}} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) - \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial z ^ {2}} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) = \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial x ^ {2}} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right).
$$

即得

$$
\begin{array}{l} H _ {r} = k i \oint_ {C} \frac {\partial}{\partial y} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \zeta - \frac {\partial}{\partial z} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right) d \eta = k i \iint_ {S} \left[ \left(\frac {\partial^ {2} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial \eta \partial y} + \frac {\partial^ {2} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial \zeta \partial z}\right) i - \frac {\partial^ {2} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial \xi \partial y} j - \frac {\partial^ {2} \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial \xi \partial z} k \right] \cdot n d S \\ = k i \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \iint_ {S} \left[ \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial x} i + \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial y} j + \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial z} k \right] \cdot n d S = k i \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \iint_ {S} \frac {r \cdot n}{r ^ {2}} d S = k i \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \iint_ {S} \frac {\cos (r , n)}{r ^ {2}} d S. \\ \end{array}
$$

同理， $H_{y} = k i \frac{\partial}{\partial y} \iint \limits_{S} \frac{\cos(r, n)}{r^{2}} \mathrm{d} S,$ $H_{z} = k i \frac{\partial}{\partial z} \iint \limits_{S} \frac{\cos(r, n)}{r^{2}} \mathrm{d} S.$

于是，最后得 $H = \frac{\partial W}{\partial x} i + \frac{\partial W}{\partial y} j + \frac{\partial W}{\partial z} k,$

即函数 $W(x,y,z)$ 是磁场 $\pmb{H}$ 的势

question: 【4384】求以曲面 $z = \pm c$ 及 $x = a\cos u\cos v + b\sin u\sin v, y = a\cos u\sin v - b\sin u\cos v, z = c\sin u$ 为界的物体的体积.
solution:
解 解法 1：

我们有

$$
x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} = a ^ {2} \cos^ {2} u + b ^ {2} \sin^ {2} u, \tag {1}
$$

以 $z = c\sin u$ 代入得

$$
x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + \frac {a ^ {2} - b ^ {2}}{c ^ {2}} z ^ {2} = a ^ {2}, \tag {2}
$$

故所界物体由平面 $z = c, z = -c$ 及曲面 (2) 围成。利用 4382 题的结果，即知所求的体积为

$$
V = \frac {1}{3} \iint_ {S _ {1} \cdot S _ {2} \cdot S _ {3}} (x \cos \alpha + y \cos \beta + z \cos \gamma) d S. \tag {3}
$$

其中 $S_{1}, S_{2}$ 分别是平面 $z = c, z = -c$ 上的部分（此时 $u = \frac{\pi}{2}, u = -\frac{\pi}{2}$，从而， $x^{2} + y^{2} = b^{2}$，故 $S_{1}, S_{2}$ 为圆盘 $x^{2} + y^{2} \leqslant b^{2}$， $S_{3}$ 表曲面 (2) 的部分， $x \cos \alpha, y \cos \beta, z \cos \gamma$ 表外法线的方向余弦。显然，在 $S_{1}$ 上， $\cos \alpha = \cos \beta = 0$， $\cos \gamma = \frac{c}{|c|}$。于是，

$$
\iint_ {S _ {1}} (x \cos \alpha + y \cos \beta + z \cos \gamma) d S = \iint_ {S _ {1}} \frac {c ^ {2}}{| c |} d S = | c | \pi b ^ {2}.
$$

同理可得 $\iint_{S_{\alpha}} (x \cos \alpha + y \cos \beta + z \cos \gamma) \mathrm{d} S = |c| \pi b^{2}$ ,

此外，有

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S _ {x}} (x \cos \alpha + y \cos \beta + z \cos \gamma) d S = \iint_ {S _ {y}} x d y d z + y d z d x + z d x d y \\ = \pm \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} d v \int_ {\frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \left[ \left(a \cos u \cos v + b \sin u \sin v\right) \left(y _ {u} ^ {\prime} z _ {v} ^ {\prime} - y _ {v} ^ {\prime} z _ {u} ^ {\prime}\right) + \left(a \cos u \sin v - b \sin u \cos v\right) \left(z _ {u} ^ {\prime} x _ {v} ^ {\prime} - z _ {v} ^ {\prime} x _ {u} ^ {\prime}\right) \right. \\ \left. + c \sin u \left(x _ {n} ^ {\prime} y _ {v} ^ {\prime} - x _ {v} ^ {\prime} y _ {u} ^ {\prime}\right) \right] d u \\ = \pm \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} d v \int_ {\frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} c a ^ {2} \cos u d u = \pm 4 \pi c a ^ {2}, \tag {4} \\ \end{array}
$$

其中的正负号应这样选取，使对应于 $S_{3}$ 的外侧。下面确定此正负号。由（2）， $S_{3}$ 的方程可写为 $F(x,y,z) = a^{2}$，其中 $F(x,y,z) = x^{2} + y^{2} + \frac{a^{2} - b^{2}}{c^{2}} z^{2}$ 是二次齐次函数。于是，在 $S_{3}$ 上，有

$$
\cos \alpha = \frac {F _ {r} ^ {\prime}}{\pm \sqrt {F _ {r} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {y} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {z} ^ {\prime 2}}}, \quad \cos \beta = \frac {F _ {y} ^ {\prime}}{\pm \sqrt {F _ {r} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {y} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {z} ^ {\prime 2}}}, \quad \cos \gamma = \frac {F _ {z} ^ {\prime}}{\pm \sqrt {F _ {r} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {y} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {z} ^ {\prime 2}}}.
$$

其中正号对应于 $S_{3}$ 的一侧，负号对应于 $S_{3}$ 的另一侧。于是，根据齐次函数的欧拉定理，在 $S_{3}$（外侧）上有

$$
x \cos \alpha + y \cos \beta + z \cos \gamma = \frac {x F _ {x} ^ {\prime} + y F _ {y} ^ {\prime} + z F _ {z} ^ {\prime}}{\pm \sqrt {F _ {x} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {y} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {z} ^ {\prime 2}}} = \frac {2 F}{\pm \sqrt {F _ {r} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {y} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {z} ^ {\prime 2}}} = \frac {2 a ^ {2}}{\pm \sqrt {F _ {x} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {y} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {z} ^ {\prime 2}}}, \tag {5}
$$

但在 $S_{3}$ 与 $Oxy$ 平面的交线（即 $x^{2} + y^{2} = a^{2}, z = 0$）的各点上，对 $S_{3}$ 的外侧，显然有（注意到曲面（2）关于 $Oxy$ 坐标平面对称）

$$
x \cos \alpha + y \cos \beta + z \cos \gamma = r \cdot n > 0,
$$

（这是因为此时径向量 $r = x_i + y_j + z_k$ 与单位外法向量 $\pmb{n}$ 的方向一致），由此可知，在 (5) 式中应取正号。于是，

$$
\iint_ {S _ {3}} (x \cos \alpha + y \cos \beta + z \cos \gamma) d S = \iint_ {S} \frac {2 a ^ {2}}{\sqrt {F _ {1} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {y} ^ {\prime 2} + F _ {z} ^ {\prime 2}}} d S > 0.
$$

从而，由（4）式知 $\iint_{S_3} (x\cos \alpha + y\cos \beta + z\cos \gamma) \, \mathrm{d}S = 4\pi |c|a^2.$

综上所述，最后得（注意（3）式）

$$
V = \frac {1}{3} (4 \pi | c | a ^ {2} + | c | \pi b ^ {2} + | c | \pi b ^ {2}) = \frac {4 \pi}{3} \left(a ^ {2} + \frac {b ^ {2}}{2}\right) | c |.
$$

解法 2：

不用曲面积分求体积的公式 (3)，而直接计算体积较为简单。由 (1) 式知，平面 $z =$ 常数（即 $u =$ 常数）与曲面 (2) 的截面 $S(z)$ 是圆，故所求的体积为

$$
\begin{array}{l} V = \int_ {- r} ^ {r} d z \iint_ {S (z)} d x d y = \int_ {- r} ^ {r} S (z) d z = \int_ {\frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \pi \left(a ^ {2} \cos^ {2} u + b ^ {2} \sin^ {2} u\right) | c | d (\sin u) \\ = | c | \pi \int_ {- \frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \left[ a ^ {2} + \left(b ^ {2} - a ^ {2}\right) \sin^ {2} u \right] d (\sin u) = \pi | c | \left[ 2 a ^ {2} + \frac {2}{3} \left(b ^ {2} - a ^ {2}\right) \right] = \frac {4 \pi}{3} \left(a ^ {2} + \frac {b ^ {2}}{2}\right) | c |. \\ \end{array}
$$

question:
【4396】证明：若函数 $u = u(x,y,z)$ 是以光滑曲面 $S$ 为界的有界闭区域 $V$ 内的调和函数，则

$$
u (x, y, z) = \frac {1}{4 \pi} \iint_ {S} \left[ u \frac {\cos (r , n)}{r ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{r} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} \right] d S.
$$

式中 $r$ 是从区域 $V$ 的内点 $(x, y, z)$ 引至曲面上的点 $(\xi, \eta, \zeta)$ 的径向量，

$$
r = \sqrt {(\xi - x) ^ {2} + (\eta - y) ^ {2} + (\zeta - z) ^ {2}},
$$

$\pmb{n}$ 为曲面 $s$ 上在点 $(\xi ,\eta ,\zeta)$ 的外法向量.
solution:
证 在 4394 题中令 $v = \frac{1}{r}$ ，则当 $(\xi, \eta, \zeta) \neq (x, y, z)$ 时，有 $\Delta v = 0$ 。现以点 $P(x, y, z)$ 为中心， $\rho$ 为半径作一球面 $S_{p}$ 含于曲面 $S$ 内，再将 4394 题应用到由曲面 $S + S_{p}$ 所包围的区域 $V$ 内，即得

$$
\iint_ {S \cdot S _ {p}} \left(\frac {1}{r} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} - u \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial n}\right) d S = 0,
$$

或 $\iint_{S_{\rho}}\left(\frac{1}{r}\frac{\partial u}{\partial n} -u\frac{\partial\left(\frac{1}{r}\right)}{\partial n}\right)\mathrm{d}S = -\iint_{S}\left(\frac{1}{r}\frac{\partial u}{\partial n} -u\frac{\partial\left(\frac{1}{r}\right)}{\partial n}\right)\mathrm{d}S.$

显然， $S$ 上的法线是向外的，而 $S_{p}$ 上的法线是指向球心的，即指向半径减少的一方。因此，

$$
\frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial n} = - \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial r} \Bigg | _ {r - p} = \frac {1}{\rho^ {2}}.
$$

于是，我们有 $\iint_{S_{\rho}}\left(\frac{1}{\rho}\frac{\partial u}{\partial n} -\frac{u}{\rho^2}\right)\mathrm{d}S = -\iint_{S}\left(\frac{1}{r}\frac{\partial u}{\partial n} -u\frac{\partial\left(\frac{1}{r}\right)}{\partial n}\right)\mathrm{d}S.$

但 $\iint_{S_{\rho}} \frac{1}{\rho} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} \mathrm{d}S = \frac{1}{\rho} \iint_{S_{\rho}} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} \mathrm{d}S = 0$ ，又利用中值定理，得

$$
\iint_ {S _ {\rho}} \frac {u}{\rho^ {2}} d S = \frac {1}{\rho^ {2}} u \left(x ^ {\prime}, y ^ {\prime}, z ^ {\prime}\right) 4 \pi \rho^ {2} = 4 \pi u \left(x ^ {\prime}, y ^ {\prime}, z ^ {\prime}\right),
$$

其中 $u(x', y', z')$ 为函数 $u$ 在球面 $S_{\rho}$ 上某点之值。从而，

$$
u \left(x ^ {\prime}, y ^ {\prime}, z ^ {\prime}\right) = \frac {1}{4 \pi} \iint_ {S} \left(\frac {1}{r} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} - u \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial n}\right) d S.
$$

上式右端与 $\rho$ 无关。而 $\lim_{\rho \to -0} u(x', y', z') = u(x, y, z)$ . 因而，令 $\rho \to +0$ 即得

$$
u (x, y, z) = \frac {1}{4 \pi} \iint_ {S} \left(\frac {1}{r} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} - u \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial n}\right) d S.
$$

又由于

$$
\begin{array}{l} \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial n} = \frac {\partial \left(\frac {1}{r}\right)}{\partial r} \frac {\partial r}{\partial n} = - \frac {1}{r ^ {2}} \left(\frac {\partial r}{\partial \xi} \cos \alpha + \frac {\partial r}{\partial \eta} \cos \beta + \frac {\partial r}{\partial \zeta} \cos \gamma\right) \\ = - \frac {1}{r ^ {2}} \left(\frac {\xi - x}{r} \cos \alpha + \frac {\eta - y}{r} \cos \beta + \frac {\zeta - z}{r} \cos \gamma\right) = - \frac {\cos (r , n)}{r ^ {2}}, \\ \end{array}
$$

故最后得 $u(x,y,z) = \frac{1}{4\pi}\iint_{S}\left[u\frac{\cos(r,n)}{r^2} +\frac{1}{r}\frac{\partial u}{\partial n}\right]\mathrm{d}S.$

question: 【4431】设流体充满空间并以恒定的角速度 $\pmb{\varpi}$ 依逆时针方向绕 $Oz$ 轴旋转。求速度向量 $\pmb{\nu}$ 和加速度向量 $\pmb{w}$ 在已知时刻在空间点 $M(x, y, z)$ 处的散度.
solution:
解 $\nu = \nu_{0} + w \times r$ . 微分之，即得
$$
\begin{array}{l} \boldsymbol {w} = \boldsymbol {w} _ {0} + \dot {\boldsymbol {w}} \times \boldsymbol {r} + \boldsymbol {w} \times \dot {\boldsymbol {r}} = \boldsymbol {w} _ {0} + \dot {\boldsymbol {w}} \times \boldsymbol {r} + \boldsymbol {w} \times \boldsymbol {v} = \boldsymbol {w} _ {0} + \dot {\boldsymbol {w}} \times \boldsymbol {r} + \boldsymbol {w} \times (\boldsymbol {v} _ {0} + \boldsymbol {w} \times \boldsymbol {r}) \\ = w _ {0} + w \times r + w \times v _ {0} + (w \cdot r) w - (w \cdot w) r ^ {*}). \\ \end{array}
$$

为了计算 $\mathrm{div}\pmb{\nu}$ 和 $\mathrm{div}\pmb{w}$ ，先计算 $\mathrm{div}(a\times r)$ ，此处 $a$ 为常向量。由于
$$
(a \times r) _ {x} = a _ {y} z - a _ {z} y, \quad (a \times r) _ {y} = a _ {z} x - a _ {x} z, \quad (a \times r) _ {z} = a _ {x} y - a _ {y} x,
$$
故得 $\operatorname{div}(a \times r) = \frac{\partial}{\partial x} (a_y z - a_z y) + \frac{\partial}{\partial y} (a_x x - a_x z) + \frac{\partial}{\partial z} (a_x y - a_y x) = 0.$
于是，即得
$$
\operatorname {d i v} \boldsymbol {v} = \operatorname {d i v} \boldsymbol {v} _ {0} + \operatorname {d i v} (\boldsymbol {w} \times \boldsymbol {r}) = 0.
$$
$$
\operatorname {d i v} w = \operatorname {d i v} w _ {0} + \operatorname {d i v} (w \times r) + \operatorname {d i v} (w \times v _ {0}) + \operatorname {d i v} [ (w \cdot r) w ] - \operatorname {d i v} [ (w \cdot w) r ],
$$
而 $\operatorname{div}[(\boldsymbol{w} \cdot \boldsymbol{r})\boldsymbol{w}] = \boldsymbol{w} \cdot r\operatorname{div}\boldsymbol{w} + \boldsymbol{w} \cdot \operatorname{grad}(\boldsymbol{w} \cdot \boldsymbol{r})^{**} = \boldsymbol{w} \cdot \boldsymbol{w}^{***} = \boldsymbol{w}^2$
及 $\operatorname{div}[(\boldsymbol{w} \cdot \boldsymbol{w})\boldsymbol{r}] = \boldsymbol{w} \cdot \boldsymbol{w}\operatorname{div}\boldsymbol{r} + \boldsymbol{r} \cdot \operatorname{grad}(\boldsymbol{w} \cdot \boldsymbol{w}) = 3\boldsymbol{w}^2,$
从而，最后得 $\mathrm{div}w = w^{2} - 3w^{2} = -2w^{2}$
*）利用向量代数中的公式（二重外积展开式）
$$
\boldsymbol {a} \times (\boldsymbol {b} \times \boldsymbol {c}) = (\boldsymbol {a} \cdot \boldsymbol {c}) \boldsymbol {b} - (\boldsymbol {a} \cdot \boldsymbol {b}) \boldsymbol {c}.
$$
$\star \star$）利用 4424 题 (3) 的结果
\*\*\*）利用 4411 题的结果

question:
【4434】设 $x = f(u, v, w), y = g(u, v, w), z = h(u, v, w)$
用正交曲线坐标 $u, v, w$ 表示 $\operatorname{div} a(x, y, z)$ . 作为特殊的情形，求用柱坐标和球坐标表示 $\operatorname{div} a$ 的表示式.
提示 研究向量 $\pmb{a}$ 通过以曲面 $u =$ 常数， $v =$ 常数， $\omega =$ 常数为界的小立体（接近于长方体） $V$ 的表面 $S$ 的通量.
solution:
解 考虑向量 $\pmb{a}$ 通过由曲面 $u =$ 常数， $v =$ 常数， $\omega =$ 常数所界的小立体（接近于长方体） $V$ 的表面 $S$ 的通量，我们有 $\pmb{a} = a_{n}e_{1} + a_{3}e_{2} + a_{4}e_{3}$ ，在 $\pmb{u}$ 曲线上，只有 $\pmb{u}$ 变化（ $v$ 和 $w$ 都是常数），故
$$
\mathrm {d} \boldsymbol {r} = \frac {\partial x}{\partial u} \mathrm {d} u \boldsymbol {i} + \frac {\partial y}{\partial u} \mathrm {d} u \boldsymbol {j} + \frac {\partial z}{\partial u} \mathrm {d} u \boldsymbol {k},
$$
从而， $\mathrm{ds}_1 = |\mathrm{d}\boldsymbol {r}| = L\mathrm{d}\boldsymbol{u}$ ，其中
$$
L = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial x}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial y}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2}} = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial f}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial g}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial h}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2}},
$$

ds 为 u 曲线上的弧元素。同理可得 $\mathrm{ds}_2 = M\mathrm{dv},\mathrm{ds}_3 = N\mathrm{dw},$
其中 $\mathrm{ds}_2, \mathrm{ds}_3$ 分别为 $v, w$ 曲线上的弧元素，而
$$
M = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial f}{\partial v}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial g}{\partial v}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial h}{\partial v}\right) ^ {2}}. \quad N = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial f}{\partial w}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial g}{\partial w}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial h}{\partial w}\right) ^ {2}}.
$$

由于坐标曲线互相垂直， $\Delta s_1, \Delta s_2, \Delta s_3$ 都很小，故 $V$ 接近于长方体。因此，其体积为
$$
V \approx \Delta s _ {1} \Delta s _ {2} \Delta s _ {3} \approx d s _ {1} d s _ {2} d s _ {3} = L M N d u d v d w.
$$

现计算 $\pmb{a}$ 通过 $V$ 的表面 $S$ 向外的通量 $\iint_{S} a_{n} \mathrm{d}S, S$ 共包括六块小曲面，记垂直于 $\pmb{e}_{1}$ 方向的两块为 $S_{1}$ 与 $S_{2}$ ，垂直于 $\pmb{e}_{2}$ 方向的两块为 $S_{3}$ 与 $S_{4}$ ，垂直于 $\pmb{e}_{3}$ 方向的两块为 $S_{5}$ 与 $S_{6}$ 。显然，由于曲面很小，有
$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S _ {2}} a _ {n} \mathrm {d} S + \iint_ {S _ {1}} a _ {n} \mathrm {d} S \approx a _ {u} \Delta S _ {2} \Delta S _ {3} \left| _ {(u - \Delta u, v, w)} - a _ {u} \Delta S _ {2} \Delta S _ {3} \right| _ {(u, v, w)} \\ \approx a _ {u} M N \mathrm {d} v \mathrm {d} w \left| _ {(u - 3 u, 1, w)} - a _ {u} M N \mathrm {d} v \mathrm {d} w \right| _ {(u, v, u)} \approx \frac {\partial (a _ {u} M N \mathrm {d} v \mathrm {d} w)}{\partial u} \mathrm {d} u = \frac {\partial (M N a _ {u})}{\partial u} \mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v \mathrm {d} w. \\ \end{array}
$$

同理可得
$$
\iint_ {S _ {1}} a _ {n} \mathrm {d} S + \iint_ {S _ {3}} a _ {n} \mathrm {d} S \approx \frac {\partial (N L a _ {v})}{\partial v} \mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v \mathrm {d} w. \quad \iint_ {S _ {6}} a _ {n} \mathrm {d} S + \iint_ {S _ {5}} a _ {n} \mathrm {d} S \approx \frac {\partial (L M a _ {w})}{\partial w} \mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v \mathrm {d} w.
$$

相加即得 $\iint_{S} a_{n} \mathrm{d} S \approx \left[ \frac{\partial (M N a_{n})}{\partial u} + \frac{\partial (N L a_{n})}{\partial v} + \frac{\partial (L M a_{w})}{\partial w} \right] \mathrm{d} u \mathrm{~d} v \mathrm{~d} w.$
于是， $\frac{\iint_{S}a_{n}\mathrm{d}S}{V}\approx \frac{1}{LMN}\left[\frac{\partial}{\partial u} (MN a_{n}) + \frac{\partial}{\partial v} (NL a_{v}) + \frac{\partial}{\partial w} (LMa_{w})\right].$
显然，当小立体 $V$ 愈缩向点 $M(V)$ 愈小）时，上述各近似等式都愈精确。于是，令 $V$ 缩向 $M$ （即 $S$ 的直径 $d(S)$ 趋于零）取极限，利用 4422 题的结果，得
$$
\operatorname {d i v} \boldsymbol {a} = \lim  _ {d (S) \rightarrow 0} \frac {\iint_ {a _ {n}} d S}{V} = \frac {1}{L M N} \left[ \frac {\partial}{\partial u} \left(M N a _ {u}\right) + \frac {\partial}{\partial v} \left(N L a _ {v}\right) + \frac {\partial}{\partial w} \left(L M a _ {w}\right)\right].
$$

特别是在柱坐标情形下，有 $x = r\cos \varphi, y = r\sin \varphi, z = z (u = r, v = \varphi, w = z)$
从而，
$$
\begin{array}{l} L = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial x}{\partial r}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial y}{\partial r}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial r}\right) ^ {2}} = 1, \quad M = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial x}{\partial \varphi}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial y}{\partial \varphi}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial \varphi}\right) ^ {2}} = r, \\ N = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial x}{\partial z}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial y}{\partial z}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial z}\right) ^ {2}} = 1. \\ \end{array}
$$

于是， $\operatorname{div} a = \frac{1}{r} \left[ \frac{\partial}{\partial r} (ra_r) + \frac{\partial a_\varphi}{\partial \varphi} + r \frac{\partial a_z}{\partial z} \right].$
在球坐标情形下，有
$$
x = r \sin \theta \cos \varphi , \quad y = r \sin \theta \sin \varphi , \quad z = r \cos \theta \quad (u = r, v = \theta , w = \varphi).
$$

从而， $L = \sqrt{\left(\frac{\partial x}{\partial r}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{\partial y}{\partial r}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial r}\right)^2} = 1,$ $M = \sqrt{\left(\frac{\partial x}{\partial\theta}\right)^{2} + \left(\frac{\partial y}{\partial\theta}\right)^{2} + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial\theta}\right)^{2}} = r,$
$$
N = \sqrt {\left(\frac {\partial x}{\partial \varphi}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial y}{\partial \varphi}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial \varphi}\right) ^ {2}} = r \sin \theta .
$$

于是，
$$
\operatorname {d i v} a = \frac {1}{r ^ {2} \sin \theta} \left[ \frac {\partial}{\partial r} \left(a _ {r} r ^ {2} \sin \theta\right) + \frac {\partial}{\partial \theta} \left(a _ {\theta} r \sin \theta\right) + \frac {\partial}{\partial \varphi} \left(a _ {\varphi} r\right) \right] = \frac {1}{r ^ {2} \sin \theta} \left[ \sin \theta \frac {\partial}{\partial r} \left(a _ {r} r ^ {2}\right) + r \frac {\partial}{\partial \theta} \left(a _ {\theta} \sin \theta\right) + r \frac {\partial a _ {\varphi}}{\partial \varphi} \right].
$$

question: 19.35 Rework Problem 19.34 when the acceleration $a = t^2 -\frac{13}{3}\mathrm{ft / s}^2$
answer: Hence, the particle changes direction at $t = -4$, $t = 1$, and $t = 3$. It moves left for $t < -4$, where it reaches a minimum; it moves right from $t = -4$ to $t = 1$, where it reaches a maximum; it moves left from $t = 1$ to $t = 3$, where it reaches a minimum; then it moves right for $t > 3$
solution: $v = \int (t^2 -\frac{13}{3})dt = \frac{1}{3} t^3 -\frac{13}{3} t + C.$ Since $v = 4$ when $t = 0,\quad C = 4$ . Thus, $v = \frac{1}{3} t^{3} - \frac{13}{3} t + 4$ Then $s = \int vdt = \frac{1}{3}\cdot \frac{1}{4} t^4 -\frac{13}{3}\cdot \frac{1}{2} t^2 +4t + C_1 = \frac{1}{12} t^4 -\frac{13}{6} t^2 +4t + C_1$ Since $s = 0$ when $t = 0,\quad C_1 = 0$ . Thus, $s = \frac{1}{12} t^4 -\frac{13}{6} t^2 +4t.$ To find critical numbers for $s$ , we set $v = 0$ obtaining $t^3 -13t + 12 = 0$ Clearly, $t = 1$ is a root. Dividing $t^3 -13t + 12$ by $t - 1$ , we obtain $t^2 +t - 12 = (t + 4)(t - 3)$ . Thus, $t = 3$ and $t = -4$ also are critical numbers. When $t = 1$ $D_{t}^{2}s = a = -\frac{10}{3} < 0$ . Hence, $s$ has a relative maximum at $t = 1$ Similarly, $a = \frac{14}{3} >0$ when $t = 3$ , and, therefore, $s$ has a relative minimum at $t = 3$ .. $a = \frac{35}{3} >0$ when $t = -4$ , and, therefore, $s$ has a relative minimum at $t = -4$ . Hence, the particle changes direction at $t = -4$ $t = 1$ , and $t = 3$ . It moves left for $t <   - 4$ , where it reaches a minimum; it moves right from $t = -4$ to $t = 1$ , where it reaches a maximum; it moves left from $t = 1$ to $t = 3$ , where it reaches a minimum; then it moves right for $t > 3$

question: 20.70 Use the trapezoidal rule with $n = 10$ to approximate $\int_0^1 x^2 dx$ .
solution:
$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {0} ^ {1} x ^ {2} d x \approx \frac {1}{2 0} \left(0 ^ {2} + 1 ^ {2} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {9} \frac {i ^ {2}}{1 0 0}\right) = \frac {1}{2 0} \left(1 + \frac {1}{5 0} \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {9} i ^ {2}\right) \\ = \frac {1}{2 0} \left(1 + \frac {1}{5 0} \cdot \frac {9 \cdot 1 0 \cdot 1 9}{6}\right) \quad [ b y P r o b l e m 2 0. 6 6 ] \\ = \frac {1}{2 0} \left(\frac {2 0 1}{3 0}\right) = 0. 3 3 5 \\ \end{array}
$$

which is close to the exact value $\frac{1}{3}$ .

question: 34.42 Rework Problem 34.33 in polar coordinates $(r,\theta)$ , where $r = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}$ , $\tan \theta = y / x$ .
solution: \begin{array}{l} \text {O n t h e g i v e n c u r v e ,} \sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}} = \sqrt {e ^ {2 t} (\cos^ {2} t + \sin^ {2} t)} = e ^ {t} \quad \text {a n d} \quad y / x = \tan t. \text {T h u s , r e p l a c i n g t b y} \theta , \text {w e} \\ \text {h a v e a s t h e e q u a t i o n o f t h e c u r v e i n p o l a r c o o r d i n a t e s :} r = e ^ {\theta} \quad \text {o r} \quad \theta = \ln r \quad (\text {a l o g a r i t h m i c s p i r a l}). \text {U s i n g t h e} \\ \text {a r c - l e n g t h f o r m u l a} s = \int_ {a} ^ {b} \sqrt {(d r / d \theta) ^ {2} + r ^ {2}} d \theta , \quad \text {w e r e r e i v e}. s = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \sqrt {e ^ {2 \theta} + e ^ {2 \theta}} d \theta = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \sqrt {2} e ^ {\theta} d \theta = \sqrt {2} (e ^ {\pi} - 1). \end{array}

question: 【2285】 $I_{n} = \int_{0}^{1}\frac{x^{n}\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 - x^{2}}}$
solution:
设 $x = \sin t$ ，代人得

$$
I _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \sin^ {n} t d t.
$$

因此，与 2281 题的结果相同

question: 【2519】直径 $20\mathrm{cm}$ ，长 $80\mathrm{cm}$ 的圆柱形汽缸充满压强为 $100\mathrm{N/cm^2}$ 的蒸汽。假定蒸气的温度保持不变，要使其体积减小一半，需要作多少功？
solution:
解 由玻意耳一马略特定律有 $p v = C$ ，其中 $\pmb{p}$ 表示气体的压强， $\pmb{\nu}$ 表示体积， $C$ 为常量。由条件知，常量
$$
C = 1 0 \cdot \pi \cdot 1 0 0 \cdot 8 0 = 8 0 0 0 \pi (N \cdot m).
$$
设初始时气体体积为 $v_{0}$ ，将区间 $\left[\frac{v_0}{2}, v_0\right]$ 分成 $n$ 个小区间，分点依次为
$$
\frac {v _ {0}}{2}, \frac {v _ {0}}{2} q, \frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {2}, \dots , \frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {i}, \dots , \frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {n} = v _ {0},
$$
其中 $q = \sqrt[3]{\frac{v_0}{\frac{v_0}{2}}} = \sqrt[3]{2}$ 由于气体体积从 $\frac{v_0}{2} q^{i+1}$ 减小至 $\frac{v_0}{2} q^i$ 需要花费功的近似值为
$$
C \left(\frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {i}\right) ^ {- 1} \left(\frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {i + 1} - \frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {i}\right),
$$
于是，所要求的功为
$$
W = \lim _ {n \rightarrow \infty} \sum_ {i = 0 } ^ { n } C \left(\frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {i}\right) ^ {- 1} \left(\frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {i + 1} - \frac {v _ {0}}{2} q ^ {i}\right) = \lim _ {n \rightarrow \infty} C n (\sqrt [ n ]{2} - 1) = C \ln 2 ^ {*})
$$
\*) 利用 541 题的结果.

question: 【2958】 $f(x) = |\cos x|$
solution:
解 由于
$$
f (x) = | \cos x | = \left| \sin \left(x + \frac {\pi}{2}\right) \right|,
$$
故有 $|\cos x| = \frac{2}{\pi} - \frac{4}{\pi} \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{\cos 2n\left(x + \frac {\pi}{2}\right)^{n}}{4n^{2} - 1} = \frac{2}{\pi} - \frac{4}{\pi} \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{(-1)^{n}\cos 2nx}{4n^{2} - 1}$
$$
= \frac {2}{\pi} + \frac {4}{\pi} \sum_ {n = 1} ^ {\infty} (- 1) ^ {n + 1} \frac {\cos 2 n x}{4 n ^ {2} - 1} \quad (- \infty < x < + \infty).
$$
*）利用2957题的结果.

question: 【3058】 $\prod_{n = 0}^{\infty}(1 + x^{2^n}) = \frac{1}{1 - x}$ （ $|x| <   1)$
solution:
由于 $(1 - x)P_{n} = (1 - x)(1 + x)\dots (1 + x^{2^{n}}) = 1 - x^{2^{n + 1}}$ ，从而（注意 $|x| < 1$ ），

$$
P _ {n} = \frac {1 - x ^ {2 ^ {n + 1}}}{1 - x} \rightarrow \frac {1}{1 - x} \quad (\text {当} n \rightarrow \infty \text {时}),
$$

故 $\prod_{n=0}^{\infty}(1+x^{2^n})=\frac{1}{1-x}$ . 利用此题的结果，易得

$$
\prod_ {n = 0} ^ {\infty} \left[ 1 + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2 ^ {n}} \right] = \frac {1}{1 - \frac {1}{2}} = 2,
$$

此即 3054 题的结果。

question: 【4194】 $\int_0^a\int_0^a\int_0^a\frac{f(x,y,z)\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y\mathrm{d}z}{\left[\left[y - \varphi(x)\right]^2 + \left[z - \psi(x)\right]^2\right]^p}$ ，其中 $0 < m \leqslant |f(x,y,z)| \leqslant M$ ，而 $\varphi(x)$ 和 $\psi(x)$ 是闭区间 $[0,a]$ 上的连续函数。
answer: 当 $p < 1$ 时收敛；当 $p \geqslant 1$ 时，若不存在 $x \in [0, a]$ 使 $0 \leqslant \varphi(x) \leqslant a, 0 \leqslant \psi(x) \leqslant a$ ，则收敛；若存在 $x \in [0, a]$ ，使 $0 < \varphi(x) < a, 0 < \psi(x) < a$ ，则发散。
solution:
解由于
$$
\frac {m}{\left\{\left[ y - \varphi (x) \right] ^ {2} + \left[ z - \psi (x) \right] ^ {2} \right\} ^ {p}} \leqslant \frac {\left| f (x , y , z) \right|}{\left\{\left[ y - \varphi (x) \right] ^ {2} + \left[ z - \psi (x) \right] ^ {2} \right\} ^ {p}} \leqslant \frac {M}{\left\{\left[ y - \varphi (x) \right] ^ {2} + \left[ z - \psi (x) \right] ^ {2} \right\} ^ {p}},
$$
并注意到广义重积分收敛必绝对收敛，即知积分与积分 $\int_0^a\int_0^a\int_0^a\frac{\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y\mathrm{d}z}{\left[\left[y - \varphi (x)\right]^2 + \left[z - \psi (x)\right]^2\right]^p}$
$$
\int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \frac {f (x , y , z) d x d y d z}{\left\{\left[ y - \varphi (x) \right] ^ {2} + \left[ z - \psi (x) \right] ^ {2} \right\} ^ {\rho}}
$$
同时收敛或同时发散。由被积函数 $\frac{1}{\left\{\left[y - \varphi(x)\right]^2 + \left[z - \psi(x)\right]^2\right\}^\rho}$ 的非负性，我们有
$$
\int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \mathrm {d} z}{\left\{\left[ y - \varphi (x) \right] ^ {2} + \left[ z - \psi (x) \right] ^ {2} \right\} ^ {p}} = \int_ {0} ^ {a} F (x) \mathrm {d} x,
$$
其中 $F(x) = \int_{0}^{a}\int_{0}^{a}\frac{\mathrm{d}y\mathrm{d}z}{\left\{\left[y - \varphi (x)\right]^{2} + \left[z - \psi (x)\right]^{2}\right\}^{p}}$ （ $0\leqslant x\leqslant a$ ）.
作变量代换 $u = y - \varphi (x),\quad v = z - \psi (x)\quad (x$ 固定），则 $\frac{D(y,z)}{D(u,v)} = \frac{1}{\frac{D(u,v)}{D(y,z)}} = 1.$
从而，有
$$
F (x) = \iint_ {\substack {- \varphi (x) \leqslant u \leqslant a - \varphi (x) \\ \psi (x) \leqslant t \leqslant a - \psi (x)}} \frac {\mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v}{\left(u ^ {2} + v ^ {2}\right) ^ {p}}. \tag{1}
$$
先设 $p < 1$ 令 $c = \max_{\psi \leq x \leq a}(|\varphi(x)| + |\psi(x)|)$ ，则由（1）式知，
$$
0 <   F (x) \leqslant \iint_ {\substack {- c \leqslant u \leqslant a - c \\ - c \leqslant v \leqslant a + c}} \frac {\mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v}{(u ^ {2} + v ^ {2}) ^ {p}} <   \iint_ {u ^ {2} \cdot v ^ {2} \leqslant 2 (a - c) ^ {2}} \frac {\mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v}{(u ^ {2} + v ^ {2}) ^ {p}} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \mathrm {d} \theta \int_ {0} ^ {\sqrt {2} (a + c)} \frac {\mathrm {d} r}{r ^ {2 p - 1}} = \frac {\pi}{1 - p} [ \sqrt {2} (a + c) ] ^ {2 - 2 p},
$$
即 $F(x)$ 有界 (实际上，仿 4186 题的证明过程还可证明 $F(x)$ 在 $0 \leqslant x \leqslant a$ 上连续)，从而， $\int_{0}^{a} F(x) \mathrm{d}x$ 是常义积分，显然收敛。由此可知，此时积分
$$
\int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \mathrm {d} z}{\left\{\left[ y - \varphi (x) \right] ^ {2} + \left[ z - \psi (x) \right] ^ {2} \right\} ^ {p}} \tag {2}
$$
收敛.
次设 $p \geqslant 1$ ，这时积分 (2) 可能收敛也可能发散，分两种情况讨论：
（i）若不存在这样的 $x \in [0, a]$ 使 $0 \leqslant \varphi(x) \leqslant a, 0 \leqslant \psi(x) \leqslant a$ 同时成立（例如， $\varphi(x)$ 或 $\psi(x)$ 的值完全位于 $[0, a]$ 之外；这时，对一切 $0 \leqslant x \leqslant a, 0 \leqslant y \leqslant a, 0 \leqslant z \leqslant a$ ，均有：连续函数 $\{[y - \varphi(x)]^2 + [z - \psi(x)]^2\}^p > 0$ 。从而，积分 (2) 收敛（这时是常义积分）。  
（ii）若存在这样的点 $x \in [0, a]$ 使 $0 < \varphi(x) < a, 0 < \psi(x) < a$ 同时成立；由 $\varphi(x)$ 与 $\psi(x)$ 的连续性，必存在正数 $\varepsilon$ 及闭区间 $I_0 \subset [0, a]$ ，使当 $x \in I_0$ 时，恒有 $\varepsilon \leqslant \varphi(x) \leqslant a - \varepsilon, \varepsilon \leqslant \psi(x) \leqslant a - \varepsilon$ ，从而由（1）式知：当 $x \in I_0$ 时，有
$$
F (x) \geqslant \iint_ {\substack {- e \leq u \leq e \\ e \leq v \leq e}} \frac {\mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v}{(u ^ {2} + v ^ {2}) ^ {p}} \geqslant \iint_ {u ^ {2} + v ^ {2} \leq e ^ {2}} \frac {\mathrm {d} u \mathrm {d} v}{(u ^ {2} + v ^ {2}) ^ {p}} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \mathrm {d} \theta \int_ {0} ^ {\epsilon} \frac {\mathrm {d} r}{r ^ {2 p - 1}} = 2 \pi \int_ {0} ^ {\epsilon} \frac {\mathrm {d} r}{r ^ {2 p - 1}} = + \infty \quad (\text {注 意} p \geqslant 1),
$$
即当 $x \in I_0$ 时恒有 $F(x) = +\infty$ ，由此可知，积分 $\int_{0}^{a} F(x) \mathrm{d}x$ 发散。于是，积分 (2) 发散。
综上所述，可知：积分
$$
\int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \frac {f (x , y , z) d x d y d z}{\left\{\left[ y - \varphi (x) \right] ^ {2} + \left[ z - \psi (x) \right] ^ {2} \right\} ^ {p}}
$$
当 $p < 1$ 时收敛；当 $p \geqslant 1$ 时，若不存在 $x \in [0, a]$ 使 $0 \leqslant \varphi(x) \leqslant a, 0 \leqslant \psi(x) \leqslant a$ ，则收敛；若存在 $x \in [0, a]$ ，使 $0 < \varphi(x) < a, 0 < \psi(x) < a$ ，则发散.

question:
【4335】 利用格林第二公式证明：若 $u = u(x,y)$ 是有界闭区域 S 内的调和函数，则

$$
u (x, y) = \frac {1}{2 \pi} \oint_ {c} \left(u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} - \ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n}\right) d s.
$$

式中 $C$ 为区域 $S$ 的边界， $\pmb{n}$ 为围线 $C$ 的外法向量， $(x, y)$ 为区域 $S$ 的内点， $r = \sqrt{(\xi - x)^2 + (\eta + y)^2}$ 为点 $(x, y)$ 与围线 $C$ 上的动点 $(\xi, \eta)$ 之间的距离。

提示 从区域 $S$ 中除去点 $(x, y)$ 与该点的无穷小的圆形邻域，并对区域 $S$ 的剩余部分（图 8.67 中的区域 $S'$ ）应用格林第二公式。
answer: $u (x, y) = \frac {1}{2 \pi} \oint_ {c} \left(u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} - \ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n}\right) d s.$
solution:
证先证 $v = \ln r$ 为 $(\xi ,\eta)((\xi ,\eta)\neq (x,y))$ 的调和函数.事实上，我们有

$$
\frac {\partial v}{\partial \xi} = \frac {\xi - r}{(\xi - x) ^ {2} + (\eta - y) ^ {2}}, \quad \frac {\partial^ {2} v}{\partial \xi ^ {2}} = \frac {(\eta - y) ^ {2} - (\xi - x) ^ {2}}{[ (\xi - x) ^ {2} + (\eta - y) ^ {2} ] ^ {2}},
$$

$$
\frac {\partial v}{\partial \eta} = \frac {\eta - y}{(\xi - x) ^ {2} + (\eta - y) ^ {2}}, \quad \frac {\partial^ {2} v}{\partial \eta ^ {2}} = \frac {(\xi - x) ^ {2} - (\eta - y) ^ {2}}{[ (\xi - x) ^ {2} + (\eta - y) ^ {2} ] ^ {2}},
$$

因此 $\frac{\partial^2 v}{\partial \xi^2} + \frac{\partial^2 v}{\partial \eta^2} = 0$ 即 $\Delta v = 0$ .

今以点 $(x, y)$ （当 $(\xi, \eta) \neq (x, y)$ 时）为中心， $\rho$ 为半径画一圆 $C_0$ ，使此圆包含在围线 $C$ 内， $C_0$ 及 $C$ 的正向如图 8.67 所示。曲线 $C$ 的法线向外， $C_0$ 的法线指向点 $(x, y)$ 。因此，在 $C_0$ 上，我们有

$$
\left. \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} \right| _ {r = \rho} = - \left. \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial r} \right| _ {r = \rho} = - \left. \frac {1}{r} \right| _ {r = \rho} = - \frac {1}{\rho}.
$$

现将格林第二公式应用到由 $C_0$ 及 $C$ 所围的区域 $S^{\prime}$ 上去，即得

$$
\iint_ {s ^ {\prime}} \left| \begin{array}{c c} \Delta u & \Delta \ln r \\ u & \ln r \end{array} \right| d \xi d \eta = \oint_ {C _ {0} + C} \left| \begin{array}{c c} \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} & \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} \\ u & \ln r \end{array} \right| d s,
$$

由于 $\Delta \ln r = 0, \Delta u = 0$ ，故得 $\oint_{C_0 + C} \left| \begin{array}{cc} \frac{\partial u}{\partial n} & \frac{\partial \ln r}{\partial n} \\ u & \ln r \end{array} \right| \mathrm{d}s = 0.$

将行列式展开，并利用曲线积分的性质，即得

$$
\oint_ {C} \left(\ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} - u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n}\right) d s = - \oint_ {c _ {0}} \left(\ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} - u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n}\right) d s.
$$

但由于

$$
\begin{array}{l} \oint_ {c _ {0}} \left(\ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} - u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n}\right) d s = \oint_ {c _ {0}} \ln \rho \frac {\partial u}{\partial n} d s - \oint_ {c _ {0}} u \left(- \frac {1}{\rho}\right) d s = 0 \cdot \ln \rho^ {*}) + \frac {1}{\rho} \oint_ {c _ {0}} u d s \\ = \frac {1}{\rho} u \left(\xi^ {\prime}, \eta^ {\prime}\right) \oint_ {c _ {0}} d s ^ {* *} = 2 \pi u \left(\xi^ {\prime}, \eta^ {\prime}\right), \\ \end{array}
$$

其中 $u(\xi', \eta')$ 为 $u$ 在圆 $C_0$ 上某点的值，故得

$$
u \left(\xi^ {\prime}, \eta^ {\prime}\right) = \frac {1}{2 \pi} \oint_ {c} \left(u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} - \ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n}\right) d s.
$$

两端令 $\rho \rightarrow +0$ 取极限，并注意到函数 $u$ 在点 $(x,y)$ 的连续性，即得

$$
u (x, y) = \frac {1}{2 \pi} \oint_ {c} \left(u \frac {\partial \ln r}{\partial n} - \ln r \frac {\partial u}{\partial n}\right) d s.
$$

\*) 利用 4331 题的结果.

$\star \star$ ）利用第一型曲线积分的中值定理，其证明方法与普通定积分的中值定理类似.
